judge_reason: Description A identifies only a handwritten signature, while Description B describes a newspaper clipping illustration and multiple stamps, indicating they are describing entirely different visual content on the page.

gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned archival document page with a small pasted newspaper clipping centered on the page, headed “Juke Box Birthed This Flying Disc, Army Expert Finds,” plus typed names with blank lines at upper right and FBI/record stamps and handwritten notations near the lower right and lower left.*
